# RAPath Malaysia

> Malaysia MDA Medical Device Regulatory Reference

Plain English reference for Malaysia MDA medical device regulation — registration, classification, Medical Device Act 2012, and post-market obligations.

RAPath is an independent open-source project providing plain English navigation aids for medical device regulatory requirements. Content is written with AI assistance and derived from publicly available official sources only. Always verify against official regulatory sources before making any regulatory decisions. Not legal or regulatory advice.

## Sections

- [Start Here](https://rapath.org/my/start-here/what-is-a-medical-device)
- [Pre-Market](https://rapath.org/my/pre-market/classification)
- [Post-Market](https://rapath.org/my/post-market/overview)
- [Legislation](https://rapath.org/my/legislation/medical-device-act-2012)
- [What's New](https://rapath.org/my/whats-new/regulatory-changes)

## Official Sources

- [MDA (Medical Device Authority)](https://www.mda.gov.my/)
- [Medical Device Act 2012 (Act 737)](https://www.mda.gov.my/act-regulation/medical-device-act-2012)
- [MeDC@St Registration System](https://emedic.mda.gov.my/)
- [ASEAN AMDD](https://asean.org/asean-medical-device-directive/)

- [All Jurisdictions](https://rapath.org/#jurisdictions)
